title: Online In-House Processing Facility. The Department shall continue to
content: 10 require all LMAs to have an online in-house processing facility for the issuance of OFW 11 Clearance of their contracted seafarer scheduled for deployment. The LMAs shall comply 12 with the documentary and reportorial requirements. 13 14 It shall be the responsibility of LMAs to ensure that they will not deploy a watchlisted 15 seafarer nor will they deploy the seafarer to a watchlisted principal/employer. In the same 16 manner, the LMAs shall ensure that the seafarer has no valid and existing contract with 17 another licensed manning agency. 18 19 The LMAs shall be subject to regular audit and/or inspection by the Department to ensure 20 compliance with the prescribed guidelines on the in-house processing facility. 21 22 The Department reserves the right to suspend in-house processing by a LMA, should 23 there be an established case of violation of this section. 24 25
